problem_statement: Parents juggling education support and therapy follow-up lose critical tasks after appointments and school notes.
target_market: Parents coordinating education and support follow-up for their children.
offered_solution: A planning workflow that turns school notes into a reviewable follow-up checklist.
validation_goal: Test whether this workflow feels useful without overstating confidence in a high-stakes parenting context.
landing_page_text: Keep education follow-up tasks visible after school meetings and parent conversations.
mvp_scope: Collect notes and return a parent-readable checklist.
concierge_mvp_idea: Founder manually reviews notes and returns a suggested follow-up plan.
assumptions: Parents feel enough coordination pain to try a lighter workflow.
constraints: Must not imply expert, medical, or legal advice.
known_risks: This category is high-stakes and could be misunderstood.
